'''thashumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycobacteriosis|mycobacteriosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycobacteriosis|mycobacteriosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thashumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæshimith|thæshimith]] || [[word:thæshimij|thæshimij]] || [[word:thæshimish|thæshimish]] || [[word:thæshimi|thæshimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thashushumuth|thashushumuth]] || [[word:thashushumuj|thashushumuj]] || [[word:thashushumush|thashushumush]] || [[word:thashushumu|thashushumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashumuth|thashumuth]] || [[word:thashumuj|thashumuj]] || [[word:thashumush|thashumush]] || [[word:thashumu|thashumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashufmuth|thashufmuth]] || [[word:thashufmuj|thashufmuj]] || [[word:thashufmush|thashufmush]] || [[word:thashufmuf|thashufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thashumuthu|thashumuthu]] || [[word:thashumuju|thashumuju]] || [[word:thashumushu|thashumushu]] || [[word:thashumuku|thashumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thashumuth|thashumuth]] || [[word:thashumuj|thashumuj]] || [[word:thashumush|thashumush]] || [[word:thashumu|thashumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thashumuthul|thashumuthul]] || [[word:thashumujul|thashumujul]] || [[word:thashumushul|thashumushul]] || [[word:thashumukul|thashumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thashumuthuthu|thashumuthuthu]] || [[word:thashumujuju|thashumujuju]] || [[word:thashumushushu|thashumushushu]] || [[word:thashumuku|thashumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thashumuthun|thashumuthun]] || [[word:thashumujun|thashumujun]] || [[word:thashumushun|thashumushun]] || [[word:thashumukun|thashumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thashumuthuoro|thashumuthuoro]] || [[word:thashumujuoro|thashumujuoro]] || [[word:thashumushuoro|thashumushuoro]] || [[word:thashumukuoro|thashumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
